properties.note: PERMANENT guest-routing restriction, not a data gap. Callan raised restricting access here (WhatsApp 2026-07-14); James agreed 2026-07-14. These crossings ARE real and confirmed — do NOT move them back to blockers.unconfirmed-crossings.geojson and do NOT unblock on 'confirmation'. Only Callan reversing the access decision lifts this.
